_snapshot_meta.name: Inbound Synthesis - Account Alerts v0
_snapshot_meta.purpose: Pre-MIN-77 reference snapshot of WF1. Captured before Slack alert redesign + Set node + synthesis blurb + best_contact_email + signal_event_ids fixes.

name: Inbound Synthesis - Account Alerts v0

parameters.query:
SELECT
  account_id,
  account_name,
  person_id,
  person_email,
  person_title,
  source,
  event_type,
  signal_weight,
  first_party,
  occurred_at
FROM signal_events
WHERE account_id = '{{ $json.body.account_id }}'
  AND occurred_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
ORDER BY occurred_at ASC

nodes.name: Score Account + Pick Contact
nodes._bug_notes: BUG 1 source: 'Insert inbound_alerts' downstream writes $json.best_contact.id as best_contact_email. The contact id == person_id (e.g. 'orion-001'), not the email. Fix: pass through person_email from signals here so the insert can write the actual email.

nodes.name: Write inbound_alerts Row

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO inbound_alerts (
  account_id, account_name, score, state, tier,
  assigned_rep_id, assigned_rep_slack_id,
  best_contact_email, best_contact_name, best_contact_title,
  score_breakdown,
  velocity_window_days, signal_count, contact_count, first_party_points,
  delivered_at
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.account.id }}',
  '{{ $json.account.name }}',
  {{ $json.scoring.final_score }},
  '{{ $json.state.toLowerCase() }}',
  'tier2',
  1,
  'U0ANRG80F2Q',
  {{ $json.best_contact ? "'" + $json.best_contact.id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.best_contact ? "'" + $json.best_contact.name + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.best_contact ? "'" + $json.best_contact.title + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.scoring) }}'::jsonb,
  7,
  {{ $json.scored_signals.length }},
  {{ $json.scoring.distinct_contacts }},
  {{ $json.scoring.first_party_score }},
  now()
) RETURNING id

nodes._bug_notes: BUG 1 confirmed here: writes $json.best_contact.id (== person_id, e.g. 'orion-001') into best_contact_email column. BUG 2 confirmed here: signal_event_ids column is not in the INSERT, so it persists as NULL.
